title: digitaria distans
intro: Digitaria distans is a type of grassy weed that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly found in various parts of the world, especially in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Digitaria distans include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
